params.name: Pure Reason Critique
params.description:
On Jul 8, 1781 AD, Kant's Pure Reason Critique was first published.
Pure Reason Critique is the first part of the famous philosopher Kant's trilogy of philosophical works. In this book, he combines conflicting philosophical thoughts of empiricism and rationalism and argues that knowledge is obtained through both reason and experience, with both playing a certain role in the human acquisition of knowledge. The publication of this work overturned the dominance of traditional metaphysics and had …
